get.description: Returns classes. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns classrooms. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns education levels. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns school period schedules. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns sub-classes. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns subjects. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns academic years. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns a paginated list of admins. Tenant-scoped.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a user account (role=admin_sekolah) and admin profile atomically.

put.description: Updates mutable fields in users and admin_profiles.

post.description: Authenticates via Supabase Auth and returns a JWT. Use the access_token as Bearer token for subsequent requests.

get.description: Returns the user ID, school, and role extracted from the Supabase JWT.

post.description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token.
Creates a Supabase Auth account and a public profile with role and school assignment.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of school subscription payment transactions. Superadmin can see all schools and filter by school_id; admin_sekolah is automatically scoped to their own school.

parameters.description: Search by school name, plan name, or provider order ID
parameters.name: search

post.description: Receives Midtrans HTTP notifications. Real notifications with complete fields are verified and processed. Probe/test requests without a complete notification payload return HTTP 200 without changing payment state.

get.description: Returns class schedules filtered by the request school context. Superadmin may provide school_id to target one school.
Returns a school summary with counts for users, academics, attendance, and subscription status.
Returns a paginated list of headmaster profiles. Superadmin may filter by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a user account (kepala_sekolah) and headmaster profile, then sets the school's current headmaster.

get.description: Returns a single headmaster profile.

put.description: Updates mutable fields of a headmaster profile.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of parents. Superadmin may filter by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a parent profile. Superadmin may provide school_id in the request body; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.

get.description: Returns a single parent profile.

put.description: Updates mutable fields of a parent profile.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's name and/or avatar.

get.description: Returns paginated schools. Superadmin sees all; others see their own.

post.description: Creates a new school tenant. Superadmin only.

get.description: Returns the active pricing plans available for school subscriptions.
Returns a single school. Others can only fetch their own school.

put.description: Updates school fields. admin_sekolah can update their own school; superadmin can update any and change status.

get.description: Returns all key-value rules for a school.

put.description: Creates or updates multiple key-value rules for a school.

get.description: Returns the active subscription for a school.

put.description: Replaces the active subscription for a school. Superadmin only.

post.description: Creates a Midtrans Snap checkout transaction for upgrading or purchasing a paid school subscription. Only admin_sekolah for the target school or superadmin may call this endpoint.

get.description: Returns the current state of a Midtrans-backed payment transaction for a school's subscription purchase or upgrade.
Returns a paginated list of staff. Superadmin may filter by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a user account (role=staff) and staff profile atomically.

put.description: Updates mutable fields in users and staff_profiles.

get.description: Generates a time-limited signed URL for a private bucket file.

post.description: Uploads a multipart file to a Supabase Storage bucket and returns the public URL.

get.description: Returns promotion history. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns student study rows. Superadmin may filter context by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.
Returns a paginated list of students. Superadmin may filter by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.

parameters.description: Search by name, email, NIS or NISN
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a user account (role=siswa) and student profile atomically.

get.description: Returns a student with parent links. Tenant-scoped.

post.description: Links an existing parent profile to a student.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of teachers. Superadmin may filter by school_id; admin_sekolah is scoped to their own school.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a user account (role=teacher) and teacher profile atomically.

put.description: Updates mutable fields in users and teacher_profiles.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users. Admin sekolah sees only their school. Superadmin sees all.

parameters.description: Search by name, email or username
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns a single user. Admin sekolah can only fetch users within their school.

put.description: Updates name and/or avatar. Admin sekolah can only update users in their school.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user. Admin sekolah cannot deactivate other admins.

put.description: Changes a user's password. Users must supply their current password; superadmin can skip it.

school_id.description:
SchoolID is required when called by superadmin (who has no school in their JWT).
admin_sekolah may omit it — their JWT school is used automatically.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and a Supabase JWT.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
